name: @arach/ora
description: TypeScript-first text-to-speech runtime primitives and playback tracking.

scripts.site:install: (cd site && bun install) && (cd docs-site && bun install)
scripts.site:build: bun run docs:generate && (cd site && bun run build) && (cd docs-site && bun run build) && bun run og:generate
scripts.content:generate: bun run docs:generate && bun run og:generate
scripts.site:docs: bun run docs:generate && (cd docs-site && bun run build)
scripts.site:all: bun run tools:build && bun run site:build
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run check && bun run build && bun run content:generate
scripts.setup:local: bun install && bun run site:install && bun run tools:install && bun run tools:build
scripts.run:all: bun run tools:build && bun run verify
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run test && bun run check && bun run build

author: arach
